[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110111 5
1 1001010 3
2 0100101 3
3 1111111 a
4 0001000 1
5 1111010 5
6 0010100 2
7 0110111 5

01 10 1110101 5
12 21 1111111 a match 3
23 32 1111111 a match 3
34 43 1111010 5 match 5
45 54 1111110 6

67 76 0111111 6
70 07 1111010 5 match 5

13 31 0101101 4
24 42 1111111 a match 3
35 53 0011100 3
46 64 1111111 a match 3
57 75 0111110 5
60 06 1110111 6
71 17 0111111 6

14 41 1111111 a match 3
25 52 1111111 a match 3
36 63 0111111 6
47 74 1111010 5 match 5
50 05 1110100 4
61 16 0110111 5 match 0 7
72 27 1111111 a match 3

37 73 0111010 4
